name: Lady Paladin Raise of the Order of Halos
description: The Lady Raise of the Order of Halos is a force of nature, a Paladin whose brash attitude blurs the line between confidence and audacity. As a woman in a traditionally male-dominated order, her very presence challenges the status quo, answering every raised eyebrow with grueling training and determination. Her oversized bastard sword is both a literal and symbolic extension of her resolve, her personal motto "You might as well speak loudly if you've got the big stick". Her armor, a blend of traditional regalia and urban edge, is marked with dents and scratches that tell of hard-fought battles. Beneath her tough exterior, her dark, straight hair frames wide hazel eyes, soft yet intense, revealing a fiercely protective and contemplative nature. While her muscular build enhances her elegance, she remains unapologetically blunt and decisive, speaking with sharp finality.
creator: Rhyma
